TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: None-1
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).

S.FORM: ohye XXXX mo s'a avaho mo uh tan'e ho baito to 'o'oko?
S.PHON: ohje **** mo sʔs svsho mo uh tsnʔe ho ɓsito to ʔoʔoko?
S.FORM: ohye XXXX mo s'a avaho mo uh tan'e ho baito to 'o'oko?
S.PHON: ohje **** mo sʔs svsho mo uh tsnʔe ho ɓsito to ʔoʔoko?
S.TRANSL: 你是再一次來這邊探望孩子們?
You came here again to see your children?

S.FORM: ya yupabobaito.
S.PHON: js jupsɓoɓsito.
S.FORM: ya yupabobaito.
S.PHON: js jupsɓoɓsito.
S.TRANSL: 是, 互相探望.
Yes, to see each other.

S.FORM: te o'a. XXXX
S.PHON: te oʔs. ****
S.FORM: te o'a. XXXX
S.PHON: te oʔs. ****
S.TRANSL: 沒有要...

TRANSL.notes: Won't (you)...

S.TRANSL: Won't ...

S.FORM: mi mio n'a ʉmnʉ 'o ceonʉ ho mo i'mi ta sica ho c'o to 'o mo mito ta'e ieh mine.
S.PHON: mi mio nʔs ɨmnɨ ʔo ʦeonɨ ho mo iʔmi ts siʦs ho ʦʔo to ʔo mo mito tsʔe ieh mine.
S.FORM: mi mio n'a ʉmnʉ 'o ceonʉ ho mo i'mi ta sica ho c'o to 'o mo mito ta'e ieh mine.
S.PHON: mi mio nʔs ɨmnɨ ʔo ʦeonɨ ho mo iʔmi ts siʦs ho ʦʔo to ʔo mo mito tsʔe ieh mine.
S.TRANSL: 從那邊路還好走嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Is that road still fine, if (we) walk from there?

S.TRANSL: Is that road still fine, if walk from there?

S.FORM: mine sngʉsngʉyo cu n'a ahta thovaha 'o moso la feofeongo.
S.PHON: mine sŋɨsŋɨjo ʦu nʔs shts thovshs ʔo moso ɗs feofeoŋo.
S.FORM: mine sngʉsngʉyo cu n'a ahta thovaha 'o moso la feofeongo.
S.PHON: mine sŋɨsŋɨjo ʦu nʔs shts thovshs ʔo moso ɗs feofeoŋo.
S.TRANSL: 有洞的地方還在鋪路嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Where there were holes (in the road) is not yet paved?

S.TRANSL: Where there were holes is not yet paved?

S.FORM: a'ʉmtʉ 'sio.
S.PHON: sʔɨmtɨ ʔsio.
S.FORM: a'ʉmtʉ 'sio.
S.PHON: sʔɨmtɨ ʔsio.

TRANSL.notes: 真是的(這些坑洞實在是.....)

S.TRANSL: 真是的

TRANSL.notes: It's really... (These holes are really ...)

S.TRANSL: It's really...

S.FORM: hoN thovaha ho lata lata o'te asngʉca mia ta ak'i.
S.PHON: hon thovshs ho ɗsts ɗsts oʔte ssŋɨʦs mis ts skʔi.
S.FORM: hoN thovaha ho lata lata o'te asngʉca mia ta ak'i.
S.PHON: hon thovshs ho ɗsts ɗsts oʔte ssŋɨʦs mis ts skʔi.
S.TRANSL: 爺爺沒有常常走怎麼要再鋪呢?
If Grandfather doesn't often walk on it, why it needs to be paved?

S.FORM: YM te'o i'vaha mia 'ia mi mimu i'vaho novei to atuhcumu emoo.
S.PHON: jm teʔo iʔvshs mis ʔis mi mimu iʔvsho novei to stuhʦumu emoo.
S.FORM: YM te'o i'vaha mia 'ia mi mimu i'vaho novei to atuhcumu emoo.
S.PHON: jm teʔo iʔvshs mis ʔis mi mimu iʔvsho novei to stuhʦumu emoo.

TRANSL.notes: 你們有再住回去(原來的)房子嗎?

S.TRANSL: 你們有再住回去 房子嗎?
Did you live back to your original house again?

S.FORM: mimza asngʉcʉ eon to sohngu ci la yoni.
S.PHON: mimzs ssŋɨʦɨ eon to sohŋu ʦi ɗs joni.
S.FORM: mimza asngʉcʉ eon to sohngu ci la yoni.
S.PHON: mimzs ssŋɨʦɨ eon to sohŋu ʦi ɗs joni.
S.TRANSL: 我們一直住在那個房子.
We always live in the rain shelter where we usually stay.

S.FORM: oh te XXXX te s'a av'a 'o 'o 'ongko to ceoa to ic'o.
S.PHON: oh te **** te sʔs svʔs ʔo ʔo ʔoŋko to ʦeos to iʦʔo.
S.FORM: oh te XXXX te s'a av'a 'o 'o 'ongko to ceoa to ic'o.
S.PHON: oh te **** te sʔs svʔs ʔo ʔo ʔoŋko to ʦeos to iʦʔo.
S.TRANSL: 那個土地的名稱要怎麼說呢?

TRANSL.notes: (what) shall (we) say the name of that land?

S.TRANSL: shall say the name of that land?

S.FORM: zou s'a 'oahng to sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: zou sʔs ʔoshŋ to sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.FORM: zou s'a 'oahng to sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: zou sʔs ʔoshŋ to sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.TRANSL: 是不是是Sngʉsngʉyo的一部份?
Is it a part of Sngʉsngʉyo?

S.FORM: ma asonʉ o'a.
S.PHON: ms ssonɨ oʔs.
S.FORM: ma asonʉ o'a.
S.PHON: ms ssonɨ oʔs.
S.TRANSL: 應該不是.
It's probably not so.

S.FORM: ohe X la eanca zou sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: ohe * ɗs esnʦs zou sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.FORM: ohe X la eanca zou sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: ohe * ɗs esnʦs zou sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.TRANSL: 過去一直都是這樣講是稱為sngʉsngʉyo.

TRANSL.notes: (people) used to say sngʉsngʉyo.

S.TRANSL: used to say sngʉsngʉyo.

S.FORM: sngʉsngʉyo uN.
S.PHON: sŋɨsŋɨjo un.
S.FORM: sngʉsngʉyo uN.
S.PHON: sŋɨsŋɨjo un.
S.TRANSL: 是Sngʉsngʉyo.

TRANSL.notes: Sngʉsngʉyo (place name).

S.TRANSL: Sngʉsngʉyo .

S.FORM: la la manci s'a eaca sngʉsngʉ 'a la s'a no enca 'a mo s'a man'i na sngʉyosi.
S.PHON: ɗs ɗs msnʦi sʔs esʦs sŋɨsŋɨ ʔs ɗs sʔs no enʦs ʔs mo sʔs msnʔi ns sŋɨjosi.
S.FORM: la la manci s'a eaca sngʉsngʉ 'a la s'a no enca 'a mo s'a man'i na sngʉyosi.
S.PHON: ɗs ɗs msnʦi sʔs esʦs sŋɨsŋɨ ʔs ɗs sʔs no enʦs ʔs mo sʔs msnʔi ns sŋɨjosi.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會叫做sngʉsngʉyo? 是不是稱為... 是不是叫sngʉyo的東西很多?
How come it is called Sngʉsngʉyo? Are there ...Are there many things called Sngʉsngʉyo?

S.FORM: nia la enca sngʉyo 'o la enca sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: nis ɗs enʦs sŋɨjo ʔo ɗs enʦs sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.FORM: nia la enca sngʉyo 'o la enca sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: nis ɗs enʦs sŋɨjo ʔo ɗs enʦs sŋɨsŋɨjo.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)通常說Sngʉsngʉyo的地方,以前稱為Snguyo嗎?

S.TRANSL: 通常說Sngʉsngʉyo的地方,以前稱為Snguyo嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Was it called Snguyo (the place we) normally call Sngʉsngʉyo?

S.TRANSL: Was it called Snguyo normally call Sngʉsngʉyo?

S.FORM: uk'a na maitan'e 'a panto nia lea.
S.PHON: ukʔs ns msitsnʔe ʔs psnto nis ɗes.
S.FORM: uk'a na maitan'e 'a panto nia lea.
S.PHON: ukʔs ns msitsnʔe ʔs psnto nis ɗes.
S.TRANSL: 今天已經沒有了.以前有.
It's not now, but it was in the past.

S.FORM: zou moso la.
S.PHON: zou moso ɗs.
S.FORM: zou moso la.
S.PHON: zou moso ɗs.
S.TRANSL: 是啊,以前...
Yes, in the past...

S.FORM: zou kukuzo honci o'te cuma na sngʉyo.
S.PHON: zou kukuzo honʦi oʔte ʦums ns sŋɨjo.
S.FORM: zou kukuzo honci o'te cuma na sngʉyo.
S.PHON: zou kukuzo honʦi oʔte ʦums ns sŋɨjo.
S.TRANSL: Sngʉyo是草的植物還是什麼呢?
Sngʉyo is the plant like straw or something?

S.FORM: evi.
S.PHON: evi.
S.FORM: evi.
S.PHON: evi.
S.TRANSL: 是樹.
Tree.

S.FORM: evi evi hoN alʉ kaahkʉmnʉ ci evi 'o'okosi 'o hʉngʉsi.
S.PHON: evi evi hon sɗɨ ksshkɨmnɨ ʦi evi ʔoʔokosi ʔo hɨŋɨsi.
S.FORM: evi evi hoN alʉ kaahkʉmnʉ ci evi 'o'okosi 'o hʉngʉsi.
S.PHON: evi evi hon sɗɨ ksshkɨmnɨ ʦi evi ʔoʔokosi ʔo hɨŋɨsi.
S.TRANSL: 是很粗的樹,竟然葉子很小.

TRANSL.notes: (It is the) tree that is thick, but the leaves are small.

S.TRANSL: tree that is thick, but the leaves are small.

S.FORM: mi mio maica ko'ko isi yainca sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: mi mio msiʦs koʔko isi jsinʦs sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.FORM: mi mio maica ko'ko isi yainca sngʉsngʉyo.
S.PHON: mi mio msiʦs koʔko isi jsinʦs sŋɨsŋɨjo.
S.TRANSL: 是這樣才稱為sngʉsngʉyo.

TRANSL.notes: (it is) in this way, so (people) called it Sngʉsngʉyo.

S.TRANSL: in this way, so called it Sngʉsngʉyo.

S.FORM: hoN oho la asona toemzeni moso la MpijiaoM man'i to ac'ʉhʉ to osi la yoni to sootento.
S.PHON: hon oho ɗs ssons toemzeni moso ɗs mpijisom msnʔi to sʦʔɨhɨ to osi ɗs joni to sootento.
S.FORM: hoN oho la asona toemzeni moso la MpijiaoM man'i to ac'ʉhʉ to osi la yoni to sootento.
S.PHON: hon oho ɗs ssons toemzeni moso ɗs mpijisom msnʔi to sʦʔɨhɨ to osi ɗs joni to sootento.
S.TRANSL: 可能那時候這樣子取名字.那時候比較多,曾經一直到莊傳道住的地方.

TRANSL.notes: (people in the past) probably named it (this). (This plant) used to be many. (It growed) and reached where the Sootento lives.

S.TRANSL: probably named it . used to be many. and reached where the Sootento lives.

S.FORM: sngʉsngʉyo mhm ayovcu.
S.PHON: sŋɨsŋɨjo mhm sjovʦu.
S.FORM: sngʉsngʉyo mhm ayovcu.
S.PHON: sŋɨsŋɨjo mhm sjovʦu.

TRANSL.notes: Sngʉsngʉyo 的植物一直延伸下去(形容從哪裡一直綿延下去).

S.TRANSL: Sngʉsngʉyo 的植物一直延伸下去 .

TRANSL.notes: (The plant sngʉyo kept) extending (its habitat).

S.TRANSL: extending .

S.FORM: iko cohivi 'e isi enca sootento.
S.PHON: iko ʦohivi ʔe isi enʦs sootento.
S.FORM: iko cohivi 'e isi enca sootento.
S.PHON: iko ʦohivi ʔe isi enʦs sootento.
S.TRANSL: 你知道這個稱為莊傳道的嗎?

TRANSL.notes: You know (the person who is) called Sootento?

S.TRANSL: You know called Sootento?

S.FORM: 'a teta 'sio.
S.PHON: ʔs tets ʔsio.
S.FORM: 'a teta 'sio.
S.PHON: ʔs tets ʔsio.
S.TRANSL: 不,他應該不知道.
No, he shouldn't know.

S.FORM: XXXX to nia vungki masakici masakici.
S.PHON: **** to nis vuŋki mssskiʦi mssskiʦi.
S.FORM: XXXX to nia vungki masakici masakici.
S.PHON: **** to nis vuŋki mssskiʦi mssskiʦi.
S.TRANSL: 對,已故的莊清吉.
Yes, the Masakici who has died.

S.FORM: hoN to niae ac'ʉhʉ to ic'o na moso n'a ma man'i na sngʉyo.
S.PHON: hon to nise sʦʔɨhɨ to iʦʔo ns moso nʔs ms msnʔi ns sŋɨjo.
S.FORM: hoN to niae ac'ʉhʉ to ic'o na moso n'a ma man'i na sngʉyo.
S.PHON: hon to nise sʦʔɨhɨ to iʦʔo ns moso nʔs ms msnʔi ns sŋɨjo.
S.TRANSL: 那個很多的sngʉyo是一直到那邊.
A lot of Sngʉyo extend their habitat to that place.

S.FORM: zou oh sngʉsngʉyo XXXX sngʉsngʉyo 'a iko n'a cohivi na ina atuhcu sngʉsngʉyo la enca.
S.PHON: zou oh sŋɨsŋɨjo **** sŋɨsŋɨjo ʔs iko nʔs ʦohivi ns ins stuhʦu sŋɨsŋɨjo ɗs enʦs.
S.FORM: zou oh sngʉsngʉyo XXXX sngʉsngʉyo 'a iko n'a cohivi na ina atuhcu sngʉsngʉyo la enca.
S.PHON: zou oh sŋɨsŋɨjo **** sŋɨsŋɨjo ʔs iko nʔs ʦohivi ns ins stuhʦu sŋɨsŋɨjo ɗs enʦs.
S.TRANSL: 你還知道那個真正的sngʉsngʉyo在哪裡?
Do you know where the so called Sngʉsngʉyo is?

S.FORM: lea leav'a 'e omzasi 'e sngʉsngʉyo?
S.PHON: ɗes ɗesvʔs ʔe omzssi ʔe sŋɨsŋɨjo?
S.FORM: lea leav'a 'e omzasi 'e sngʉsngʉyo?
S.PHON: ɗes ɗesvʔs ʔe omzssi ʔe sŋɨsŋɨjo?
S.TRANSL: 這個Sngʉsngʉyo的上面是叫什麼?

TRANSL.notes: (What is) the above of Sngʉsngʉyou usually called?

S.TRANSL: the above of Sngʉsngʉyou usually called?

S.FORM: 'e omzasi zou 'o la enca zou c'u 'o la enca cuu?
S.PHON: ʔe omzssi zou ʔo ɗs enʦs zou ʦʔu ʔo ɗs enʦs ʦuu?
S.FORM: 'e omzasi zou 'o la enca zou c'u 'o la enca cuu?
S.PHON: ʔe omzssi zou ʔo ɗs enʦs zou ʦʔu ʔo ɗs enʦs ʦuu?
S.TRANSL: 這個它的上面就是我們說...就是我們說池塘?

TRANSL.notes: The above of it is what (we/people usually) say 'pond'?

S.TRANSL: The above of it is what say 'pond'?

S.FORM: 'a i'o peohna ne to lasi eoni to na ito kesa 'o la enca cuu.
S.PHON: ʔs iʔo peohns ne to ɗssi eoni to ns ito kess ʔo ɗs enʦs ʦuu.
S.FORM: 'a i'o peohna ne to lasi eoni to na ito kesa 'o la enca cuu.
S.PHON: ʔs iʔo peohns ne to ɗssi eoni to ns ito kess ʔo ɗs enʦs ʦuu.

TRANSL.notes: 那個稱為cuu的是Kesa(的家)下面.

S.TRANSL: 那個稱為cuu的是Kesa 下面.
Cuu locates below where Kesa lives

S.FORM: oh cuu hu ah.
S.PHON: oh ʦuu hu sh.
S.FORM: oh cuu hu ah.
S.PHON: oh ʦuu hu sh.
S.TRANSL: Cuu...是湖啊.
Cuu... is lake.

S.FORM: ah 'ao mo i'o panto panto la eainca hipongana.
S.PHON: sh ʔso mo iʔo psnto psnto ɗs esinʦs hipoŋsns.
S.FORM: ah 'ao mo i'o panto panto la eainca hipongana.
S.PHON: sh ʔso mo iʔo psnto psnto ɗs esinʦs hipoŋsns.
S.TRANSL: 有一個叫做hipongana的地方.
There is a place called Hipongana.

S.FORM: hipongana o'a no eni eni 'o la enca hipongana?
S.PHON: hipoŋsns oʔs no eni eni ʔo ɗs enʦs hipoŋsns?
S.FORM: hipongana o'a no eni eni 'o la enca hipongana?
S.PHON: hipoŋsns oʔs no eni eni ʔo ɗs enʦs hipoŋsns?
S.TRANSL: Hipongana.稱為hipongana的地方不是這裡嗎?
Hipongana. Isn't the so-called Hipongana this place?

S.FORM: zou zou 'o ihe yoni to nia noliuki na atuhcu hoci o'te na isi enca hipongana.
S.PHON: zou zou ʔo ihe joni to nis noɗiuki ns stuhʦu hoʦi oʔte ns isi enʦs hipoŋsns.
S.FORM: zou zou 'o ihe yoni to nia noliuki na atuhcu hoci o'te na isi enca hipongana.
S.PHON: zou zou ʔo ihe joni to nis noɗiuki ns stuhʦu hoʦi oʔte ns isi enʦs hipoŋsns.
S.TRANSL: 主要的地方是已故的noliuki那邊,或是...那個稱為Hipongana的.

TRANSL.notes: (The main area located where) the late Noliuki lived, or perhaps (the place) called Hipongana.

S.TRANSL: the late Noliuki lived, or perhaps called Hipongana.

S.FORM: mais'a ic'o na isi atuhca eainca hipongana.
S.PHON: msisʔs iʦʔo ns isi stuhʦs esinʦs hipoŋsns.
S.FORM: mais'a ic'o na isi atuhca eainca hipongana.
S.PHON: msisʔs iʦʔo ns isi stuhʦs esinʦs hipoŋsns.
S.TRANSL: 好像是那個主要稱作hipongana的地方.
It seems to be the main area called Hipongana.

S.FORM: ohN moso la yon to ic'o na nia LaoJia to noliuki?
S.PHON: ohn moso ɗs jon to iʦʔo ns nis ɗso*is to noɗiuki?
S.FORM: ohN moso la yon to ic'o na nia LaoJia to noliuki?
S.PHON: ohn moso ɗs jon to iʦʔo ns nis ɗso*is to noɗiuki?
S.TRANSL: Noliuki的老家以前是在那裡.
Noliuki's old house was located there.

S.FORM: hoN 'ia moso la yon to ic'o.
S.PHON: hon ʔis moso ɗs jon to iʦʔo.
S.FORM: hoN 'ia moso la yon to ic'o.
S.PHON: hon ʔis moso ɗs jon to iʦʔo.
S.TRANSL: 喔,是在那邊喔.
Oh, yes, it is there.

S.FORM: 'a oho c'o la eno enca voehipongana 'o nia amovoyu.
S.PHON: ʔs oho ʦʔo ɗs eno enʦs voehipoŋsns ʔo nis smovoju.

S.PHON: ʔs oho ʦʔo ɗs eno enʦs voehipoŋsns ʔo nis smovoju.
S.TRANSL: 那個已故的 amo voyu以前就是直接稱它voehipongana.
Amo Voyu, who died, called it Voehipongana.

S.FORM: oh voehipongana o'a eni na la enca hipongana.
S.PHON: oh voehipoŋsns oʔs eni ns ɗs enʦs hipoŋsns.
S.FORM: oh voehipongana o'a eni na la enca hipongana.
S.PHON: oh voehipoŋsns oʔs eni ns ɗs enʦs hipoŋsns.
S.TRANSL: Voehipngana? 稱為hipongana的不是這裡?
Voehipongana? The so-called Hipongana is not here?

S.FORM: o'a nte s'a enca eni hipongana te av'a.
S.PHON: oʔs nte sʔs enʦs eni hipoŋsns te svʔs.
S.FORM: o'a nte s'a enca eni hipongana te av'a.
S.PHON: oʔs nte sʔs enʦs eni hipoŋsns te svʔs.
S.TRANSL: 這裡不是稱作hipongana嗎?要怎麼講...

TRANSL.notes: Here is not called Hipongana? What should (we) say...

S.TRANSL: Here is not called Hipongana? What should say...

S.FORM: oho s'a la yaeza enca cuu eni?
S.PHON: oho sʔs ɗs jsezs enʦs ʦuu eni?
S.FORM: oho s'a la yaeza enca cuu eni?
